created_by.description: Optional. Restrict results to alerts created by the user with this UUID.

insight_id.description: Optional. Restrict results to alerts on this insight ID.

limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

search.description: Optional. Fuzzy match against alert `name` using Postgres trigram word similarity (handles typos, transpositions, and prefix-as-you-type). Results are ordered by relevance, then creation time. Capped at 200 characters; longer queries return a 400 error.
